headline: Kalshi, Oura Ring, and AT&T Score the Most Engaging Ads of the FIFA World Cup 2026™, ranked by TV outcomes data on edo.com/worldcup
summary: NEW YORK, July 20, 2026--EDO, the TV outcomes company, today released its performance ranking of the entire FIFA World Cup 2026™ — from the tournament's opening match to the final. EDO’s World Cup TV outcomes ranker showcases brands like Kalshi, Oura Ring, and AT&T in the lead with the most engaging spots of the tournament. EDO scored every national World Cup ad, across English and Spanish language airings, based on how effective each spot was at driving the investment-grade signals most proven

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Avoid
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.
